headline: Is FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: Wondering if FactSet Research Systems at around US$232 a share still lines up with its fundamentals, or if the market has moved ahead of the story. The stock has been volatile, with a 4.3% decline over the last 7 days, a 13.6% gain over the past month, yet returns of 18.5% lower year to date and 45.5% lower over the last year. Those mixed returns over 1, 3 and 5 years, with falls of 45.5%, 39.0% and 27.4% respectively, leave many investors asking whether recent price moves reflect changing...
